name: TravelDocumentsAgent
description: Creates comprehensive, visually appealing travel documents with local events, attractions, restaurants, and recommendations. Receives travel booking details and generates beautiful HTML/PDF documents enriched with destination research via Google Search.

skills.name: Create Travel Document
skills.description: Creates a comprehensive, visually appealing travel document with local events, attractions, restaurants, and activities based on travel booking information.
examples: Create a travel document for my trip to Mallorca from July 15-22
Generate a travel itinerary with local events and attractions
Make a travel document with restaurant recommendations for my Paris trip

skills.name: Search Destination Info
skills.description: Searches for local events, festivals, attractions, restaurants, and activities at a travel destination during specific dates using Google Search.
examples: Find events in Barcelona during August 2025
What attractions are there in Rome?
Search for restaurants near my hotel in Tokyo
